fix_strategy: introduce interface at cycle boundary, apply dependency inversion
extract facade or mediator, split package into focused sub-packages
extract cohesive method groups into dedicated structs with interfaces
group related fields into embedded structs or value objects

threshold: any struct field referencing a concrete type from another package
fix_strategy: replace concrete field type with a locally-defined interface
split into smaller role-specific interfaces, compose where all are needed
extract cohesive subsets into dedicated structs, use composition and delegation
decompose into smaller functions, introduce abstraction layer

threshold: external calls > own receiver calls AND external calls >2
fix_strategy: move method to the type whose data it uses most, or extract a dedicated service

threshold: struct used directly in >5 distinct files
fix_strategy: introduce interface in front of widely-used type, reduce direct concrete coupling
